profile.name: Fiqram Akmal
profile.title: Electrical Engineering Student | Cybersecurity & IoT Enthusiast
profile.summary: Electrical Engineering undergraduate at Universitas Padjadjaran with hands-on experience in cybersecurity and IoT systems development. Demonstrated ability to identify and responsibly disclose critical security vulnerabilities (CVSS 10.0) in government and enterprise systems. Proficient in penetration testing, web security, SQL injection analysis, access control assessment, and IoT/AIoT prototyping using Python and ESP32. Actively seeking opportunities in cybersecurity and IoT engineering.

description: Collaborated in the FqrmDBL team on AI and IoT application development using Python.
Applied machine learning concepts and IoT integration in real-world project scenarios.
Gained practical experience in AIoT system design and implementation.

experience.company: Himpunan Mahasiswa Teknik Elektro UNPAD, Jatinangor
description: Managed digital media and information dissemination for the electrical engineering student association.
Contributed to organizational communication and public engagement initiatives.

projects.title: WEATHERING — AIoT Smart Watering Decision System
projects.description: Developed an AIoT system fusing real-time IoT sensor data (soil moisture, temperature, humidity) with weather forecasts to automate irrigation decisions. Built a Random Forest Classification model using Scikit-Learn; deployed a Streamlit dashboard.
projects.image_alt: Smart irrigation dashboard and plant monitoring setup

projects.title: Smart Hydroponic Monitoring & Control System
projects.description: Designed an IoT-based hydroponic system using ESP32 microcontroller with Flask-based REST API backend. Enabled real-time remote monitoring and control via web interface.
projects.image_alt: Embedded system electronics and monitoring interface

projects.title: Responsible Disclosure — Chained RCE Attack (CVSS 10.0)
projects.description: Discovered a critical attack chain: .git Directory Exposure → Source Code Leak → Database Credential Exposure → Public MSSQL Access → Remote Code Execution. Reported to Perumda Tugu Tirta Kota Malang.
projects.image_alt: Cybersecurity analysis dashboard on dark screens

projects.title: Responsible Disclosure — SQL Injection
projects.description: Discovered and disclosed a Cookie-header SQL Injection vulnerability in a North Kalimantan Provincial Government web application (ciku.kaltaraprov.go.id). Received official Certificate of Appreciation.
projects.image_alt: Secure coding screen with highlighted code

projects.title: Responsible Disclosure — Broken Access Control
projects.description: Identified misconfigured PostgreSQL Row-Level Security (RLS) causing IDOR vulnerability exposing customer records via PostgREST API. Remediated by Hairnerds team.
projects.image_alt: Database security concept with pink-lit screens

certifications.name: SKF100: Understanding the OWASP® Top 10 Security Threats

achievements.title: Certificate of Appreciation — DKISP Provinsi Kalimantan Utara
achievements.description: Officially recognized for responsibly disclosing a SQL Injection vulnerability in a government web application.

achievements.title: Certificate of Appreciation — Perumda Air Minum Tugu Tirta Kota Malang
achievements.description: Officially recognized for responsibly disclosing a critical RCE vulnerability chain (CVSS 10.0) in web infrastructure.
